note: The shape catalog (docs/cascade.md): a DECLARED, content-hash-versioned document — shapes are convention, never authority; adopting a new version IS the boundary change. Nesting spine is single-parent (within); a lateral overlap shape carries overlaps and no within. Ships EMPTY so default-hold is the machine's literal default: with no shapes, bin/place holds everything. Example spine: {"id":"fort-collins","level":"city","within":"larimer"}, {"id":"larimer","level":"county","within":"colorado"}, {"id":"colorado","level":"state"}. Example lateral: {"id":"cd04","level":"district","overlaps":["larimer","weld"]}.
